title: Shareable URL in the Api Calls

posts.author: kustrica35 (Emirio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I need a way to get the shareable URL programmatically without opening the board share link.
If the popup is opened and the URL is regenerated, then I also want to get it with a webhook to update my app’s database.
Thanks.
Emirio

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @kustrica35 and welcome to the community!

Since it is not possible to get the URL via API or get a webhook for it, this is taken as a feature request so that our team is in the loop and others can vote for it

Cheers,
Matias
